name: Buttermilk Mustard Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tbsp cucumber, peeled and seeded, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Transfer to a jar or container and chill before serving.
4. Makes about 3/4 cup, enough for 12 servings.
Note: This recipe is from "Light & Easy Diabetes Cuisine" by Betty Marks.
